faqs.question: How can media request interviews or coverage?
faqs.answer: Media inquiries should be directed to our Communications Department at media@spacewing.com or 1-800-SPACE-WING ext. 7. Please include: outlet name, requested content type, deadline, and specific requests. We accommodate interviews with executives, astronauts, and technical experts. Press kits are available for download at spacewing.com/press.

faqs.question: Are press flights available?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing offers complimentary press seats on select missions for qualified journalists. Criteria include: established publication or broadcast outlet, space or technology journalism experience, and agreed coverage commitment. Application details are available at spacewing.com/press. Press flights are limited and competitive.

faqs.question: Can journalists attend launches?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing welcomes media coverage of launches. Accredited journalists can apply for press credentials through our website. Press access includes: dedicated viewing area, press briefings, post-launch interviews, and media center facilities. Credentials are free but require advance application and verification.

faqs.question: What imagery is available for media use?
faqs.answer: Our media library (spacewing.com/media) includes: high-resolution spacecraft images, mission photography, 4K video footage, crew and astronaut photos, facility tours, and animation/renderings. Most content is available royalty-free for editorial use with credit. Custom imagery requests can be submitted through the media portal.

faqs.question: Can travelers share their experience publicly?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Travelers retain rights to their personal photos and videos. We encourage sharing your experience on social media and with media outlets. SpaceWing provides a media kit to all travelers including professional photos and video clips for personal use. For paid media appearances, we ask for advance notification.

faqs.question: What is SpaceWing's social media policy for travelers?
faqs.answer: Travelers may post about their experience freely! We provide complimentary WiFi for live posting and streaming. Guidelines include: no disclosure of proprietary information, no filming of other travelers without consent, and respectful content. Our social media team is available to assist with amplifying your posts. Tag @SpaceWing for a chance to be featured!

faqs.question: Are there documentary opportunities?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing works with documentary filmmakers and production companies. We offer: embedded documentary access, interview opportunities, facility filming, and mission documentation. Past documentaries have appeared on major networks and streaming services. Contact our Documentary Partnerships team at documentaries@spacewing.com.

faqs.question: How does SpaceWing handle breaking news?
faqs.answer: For mission updates and news, subscribe to our press distribution list or follow @SpaceWingPR on social media. Breaking news is announced through: press releases, social media, website updates, and press briefings. Our Communications team is available 24/7 during missions for media inquiries.

faqs.question: Can content creators partner with SpaceWing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Creator Program partners with content creators, influencers, and digital storytellers. Benefits include: priority booking, exclusive content access, partnership opportunities, and potential sponsored content arrangements. Apply at spacewing.com/creators. We look for authentic voices passionate about space exploration.

faqs.question: What press releases are available?
faqs.answer: All SpaceWing press releases are available at spacewing.com/press. Categories include: mission announcements, company news, partnerships, technology developments, and milestones. Subscribe to our press distribution list for immediate notification of new releases. Translations available in major languages.
